en.name: Herblore: Supplement & Health Guide
en.subtitle: Stack Builder, Timing & Interactions
en.description:
Your personal supplement encyclopedia and stack optimizer.

Herblore helps you build the perfect supplement stack with evidence-based information, smart interaction checking, and optimized daily timing.

--- WHAT YOU GET ---

• 200+ Supplement Cards — Vitamins, minerals, herbs, adaptogens, superfoods, and more. Each card includes dosage ranges, timing advice, benefits with evidence levels, and contraindications.

• Smart Stack Builder — Build your personal supplement stack. Herblore automatically checks for interactions, synergies, and conflicts between everything in your stack.

• Daily Timeline — Get an optimized daily schedule that tells you exactly what to take and when, based on absorption science and your personal stack.

• AI Wellness Coach — Ask questions about your supplements, timing, and interactions. Powered by AI with medical disclaimers on every response.

• Evidence-Based — Every benefit is tagged with its evidence level: clinical trial, observational study, or traditional use. Real PubMed references included.

• Goal-Based Discovery — Filter supplements by your health goals: Energy, Sleep, Focus, Immunity, Stress, Digestion, Skin, Longevity, Recovery, or Joint Health.

--- IMPORTANT ---

Herblore is an educational wellness reference. It does not diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease. Always consult a healthcare provider before starting any supplement.

Subscription options:
• Weekly: $4.99/week (3-day free trial)
• Yearly: $29.99/year (3-day free trial)

Payment is charged to your Apple ID account. Subscriptions automatically renew unless cancelled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period.
en.whatsNew: Initial release! Browse 200+ evidence-based supplement cards, build your personal stack, get optimized daily timing, and check interactions.
en.promotionalText: Build your perfect supplement stack with evidence-based information and smart interaction checking.

fr.name: Herblore : Guide Suppléments & Santé
fr.subtitle: Stack Builder, Timing & Interactions
fr.description:
Votre encyclopédie personnelle de suppléments et optimiseur de stack.

Herblore vous aide à construire le stack de suppléments parfait avec des informations basées sur la science, une vérification intelligente des interactions et un timing quotidien optimisé.

--- CE QUE VOUS OBTENEZ ---

• 200+ Fiches Suppléments — Vitamines, minéraux, herbes, adaptogènes, superaliments et plus. Chaque fiche inclut les dosages, conseils de timing, bienfaits avec niveaux de preuve et contre-indications.

• Constructeur de Stack Intelligent — Créez votre stack personnel. Herblore vérifie automatiquement les interactions, synergies et conflits.

• Planning Quotidien — Un programme quotidien optimisé qui vous dit exactement quoi prendre et quand.

• Coach IA — Posez vos questions sur vos suppléments, le timing et les interactions.

--- IMPORTANT ---

Herblore est une référence éducative. Il ne diagnostique, traite, guérit ou prévient aucune maladie. Consultez toujours un professionnel de santé.
fr.whatsNew: Première version ! Parcourez 200+ fiches de suppléments, construisez votre stack et obtenez un timing quotidien optimisé.
fr.promotionalText: Construisez votre stack de suppléments parfait avec des informations basées sur la science.

it.name: Herblore: Guida Integratori & Salute
it.subtitle: Stack Builder, Tempi & Interazioni
it.description:
La tua enciclopedia personale di integratori e ottimizzatore di stack.

Herblore ti aiuta a costruire lo stack di integratori perfetto con informazioni basate sulle evidenze, controllo intelligente delle interazioni e tempistiche giornaliere ottimizzate.

--- COSA OTTIENI ---

• 200+ Schede Integratori — Vitamine, minerali, erbe, adattogeni, superfood e altro. Ogni scheda include dosaggi, consigli sui tempi, benefici con livelli di evidenza e controindicazioni.

• Costruttore di Stack Intelligente — Crea il tuo stack personale. Herblore controlla automaticamente interazioni, sinergie e conflitti.

• Programma Giornaliero — Un programma ottimizzato che ti dice esattamente cosa prendere e quando.

• Coach IA — Fai domande sui tuoi integratori, tempistiche e interazioni.

--- IMPORTANTE ---

Herblore è un riferimento educativo. Non diagnostica, tratta, cura o previene alcuna malattia. Consulta sempre un professionista sanitario.
it.whatsNew: Prima versione! Sfoglia 200+ schede di integratori, costruisci il tuo stack e ottieni tempistiche giornaliere ottimizzate.
it.promotionalText: Costruisci il tuo stack di integratori perfetto con informazioni basate sulle evidenze.
